---
title: ""
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
---


```{python}
import pandas as pd
import gseapy as gp
import plotly.express as px
import json
import numpy as np
from gseapy import Biomart
import plotly.graph_objs as go
from itables import show

from utils import volcano_plotly, ORA_plotly, GSEA_plotly,volcano_matplotlib_with_textalloc,pca_from_adata
```

## Data

```{python}
#| column: page-right
contrast = ""
df = pd.read_csv(f"../results/contrasts/{contrast}.csv",sep=';')

df_todisplay = df.copy()
df_todisplay = df_todisplay.dropna(subset='padj')
df_todisplay = df_todisplay[['gene_id','gene_name','baseMean','log2FoldChange','pvalue','padj']]
show(df_todisplay,maxBytes=0)
```

```{python}
# Define the cutoff value for log2 fold change
log2FC_cutoff = 1

# Calculate the total number of significant entries
TOTAL = len(df[df['padj'] <= 0.05])

# Calculate the number of significant entries with positive log2 fold change
UP = len(df[(df['padj'] <= 0.05) & (df['log2FoldChange'] > 0)])

# Calculate the number of significant entries with negative log2 fold change
DOWN = len(df[(df['padj'] <= 0.05) & (df['log2FoldChange'] < 0)])

# Calculate the number of significant entries with positive log2 fold change greater than the cutoff
UP_withFC = len(df[(df['padj'] <= 0.05) & (df['log2FoldChange'] > log2FC_cutoff)])

# Calculate the number of significant entries with negative log2 fold change less than the negative cutoff
DOWN_withFC = len(df[(df['padj'] <= 0.05) & (df['log2FoldChange'] < -log2FC_cutoff)])

# Calculate the total number of significant entries with an absolute fold change greater than the cutoff
TOTAL_sign = len(df[(df['padj'] <= 0.05) & (df['log2FoldChange'].abs() > log2FC_cutoff)])

gene_name_DEG = df[(df['padj'] <= 0.05) & (df['log2FoldChange'].abs() > log2FC_cutoff)]['gene_name'].tolist()

```

## Number of Differentially Expressed Genes:

- Total: `{python} TOTAL`
- Up regulated: `{python} UP`
- Down regulated: `{python} DOWN`
- Total significant with |log2(FC)| > `{python} log2FC_cutoff`: `{python} TOTAL_sign`
- Up regulated with log2(FC) > `{python} log2FC_cutoff`: `{python} UP_withFC`
- Down regulated with log2(FC) < -`{python} log2FC_cutoff`: `{python} DOWN_withFC`

## Volcano plot

```{python}
color_palette = ('#00BFC4','#F8766D') #treated, control
```

:::panel-tabset

## plotly
```{python}
#| column: page
volcano_plotly(df, cutoff_fc=log2FC_cutoff, cutoff_p=0.05,highlight_n=30,xlim=(-5,5),color_palette=color_palette)
```

## cleaned
```{python}
#| column: page
volcano_matplotlib_with_textalloc(df,cutoff_p=0.05,cutoff_fc=log2FC_cutoff,highlight_n=30,x_range=(-8,8),color_palette=color_palette)
```
:::

```{python}
ora_res = pd.read_csv(f"../results/pathway/ORA/ORA_GO_{contrast}_ALL.csv",sep=';')
ora_res_up = pd.read_csv(f"../results/pathway/ORA/ORA_GO_{contrast}_UP.csv",sep=';')
ora_res_down = pd.read_csv(f"../results/pathway/ORA/ORA_GO_{contrast}_DOWN.csv",sep=';')
```


## Pathway

### ORA plot

::: panel-tabset

## Total

```{python}
#| column: page
ORA_plotly(ora_res,height=1000,width=1100)
```

## Up
```{python}
#| column: page
ORA_plotly(ora_res_up,height=1000,width=1100)
```

## Down
```{python}
#| column: page
ORA_plotly(ora_res_down,height=1000,width=1100)
```


:::

### ORA Data

::: panel-tabset

## Total

```{python}
#| column: screen-inset
ora_res_todisplay = ora_res[['Term','Overlap_Ratio','P-value','Adjusted P-value', 'Odds Ratio','Count','Genes']]
show(ora_res_todisplay,maxBytes=0)
```

## Up

```{python}
#| column: screen-inset

ora_res_up_todisplay = ora_res_up[['Term','Overlap_Ratio','P-value','Adjusted P-value', 'Odds Ratio','Count','Genes']]
show(ora_res_up_todisplay,maxBytes=0)
```


## Down
```{python}
#| column: screen-inset
ora_res_down_todisplay = ora_res_down[['Term','Overlap_Ratio','P-value','Adjusted P-value', 'Odds Ratio','Count','Genes']]
show(ora_res_down_todisplay,maxBytes=0)
```

:::

```{python}
gsea_res_mouse_go = pd.read_csv(f"../results/pathway/GSEA/GSEA_GO_{contrast}.csv",sep=';')
gsea_res_mouse_kegg = pd.read_csv(f"../results/pathway/GSEA/GSEA_KEGG_{contrast}.csv",sep=';')
gsea_res_mouse_HM = pd.read_csv(f"../results/pathway/GSEA/GSEA_HM_{contrast}.csv",sep=';')
```

### GSEA plot

::: panel-tabset

## GO ALL

```{python}
#| column: page
GSEA_plotly(gsea_res_mouse_go)
```

## GO UP
```{python}
#| column: page
gsea_res_mouse_go_up = gsea_res_mouse_go[gsea_res_mouse_go['NES']>0]
GSEA_plotly(gsea_res_mouse_go_up)
```

## GO Down

```{python}
#| column: page
gsea_res_mouse_go_down = gsea_res_mouse_go[gsea_res_mouse_go['NES']<0]
GSEA_plotly(gsea_res_mouse_go_down)
```

## KEGG ALL

```{python}
#| column: page
gsea_res_mouse_kegg
GSEA_plotly(gsea_res_mouse_kegg)
```

## KEGG UP

```{python}
#| column: page
gsea_res_mouse_kegg_up = gsea_res_mouse_kegg[gsea_res_mouse_kegg['NES']>0] 
GSEA_plotly(gsea_res_mouse_kegg_up)
```
## KEGG DOWN

```{python}
#| column: page
gsea_res_mouse_kegg_down = gsea_res_mouse_kegg[gsea_res_mouse_kegg['NES']<0] 
GSEA_plotly(gsea_res_mouse_kegg_down)
```

## Hallmark ALL

```{python}
#| column: page
GSEA_plotly(gsea_res_mouse_HM)
```
## Hallmark UP

```{python}
#| column: page
gsea_res_mouse_HM_up = gsea_res_mouse_HM[gsea_res_mouse_HM['NES']>0]
GSEA_plotly(gsea_res_mouse_HM_up)
```
## Hallmark DOWN

```{python}
#| column: page
gsea_res_mouse_HM_down = gsea_res_mouse_HM[gsea_res_mouse_HM['NES']<0]
GSEA_plotly(gsea_res_mouse_HM_down)
```

:::

### GSEA data

::: panel-tabset

## GO

```{python}
#| column: screen-inset
gsea_res_mouse_go_todisplay = gsea_res_mouse_go[['Term','NES','FDR q-val non zero','Tag_%','Gene %', 'Lead_genes']]
show(gsea_res_mouse_go_todisplay,maxBytes=0)
```

## KEGG
```{python}
#| column: screen-inset
gsea_res_mouse_kegg_todisplay = gsea_res_mouse_kegg[['Term','NES','FDR q-val non zero','Tag_%','Gene %', 'Lead_genes']]
show(gsea_res_mouse_kegg_todisplay,maxBytes=0)
```

## Hallmark
```{python}
#| column: screen-inset
gsea_res_mouse_HM_todisplay = gsea_res_mouse_HM[['Term','NES','FDR q-val non zero','Tag_%','Gene %', 'Lead_genes']]
show(gsea_res_mouse_HM_todisplay,maxBytes=0)
```

:::
